title: Add a low-cost closure constraint before heavier numerics
summary: Reframe the current target observable as a consistency-bootstrap problem with typed assumptions and one additional closure constraint. Goal: improve or falsify the baseline direction before introducing a heavier backend.

expected_artifacts.description: Step-by-step derivation of the added constraint and its assumptions (NOT_FOR_CITATION).
Baseline vs constrained outputs with reproducible logs and hashes.

verification_plan: Reproduce the baseline under identical assumptions, then rerun after enabling the new closure constraint and persist both outputs with comparable metrics.
risks: The added constraint may be redundant; mitigate by proving what new information it contributes before large compute.
Assumption bookkeeping may be incomplete; mitigate with typed assumptions and explicit reviewer signoff.
